compiled_state.title: SC13 post-deployment: measure workflow-restart rate drop against pre-736d-b957 baseline
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
SC13 for epic 736d-b957 requires a ≥30% workflow-restart rate drop against the pre-epic baseline. The measurement tooling is in place (sc13-restart-analysis.sh, preconditions-baseline-collect.sh), but the measurement requires live production data and cannot be captured at epic-close time.

Action required after deployment:
1. Run preconditions-baseline-collect.sh against the last 30 days of session logs to capture the post-implementation rate
2. Compare against the pre-epic baseline (establish from git history before story a96b-7ba8 merged)
3. Feed both rates to sc13-restart-analysis.sh --confidence=0.95 to compute Wilson CI
4. If drop >= 30% with CI lower bound > 0%: SC13 satisfied
5. If drop < 30%: file a follow-up epic to diagnose and strengthen the preconditions coverage

Parent epic: 736d-b957 (closed)
